title: lgwks-expression/1 Plan
description: Compiled plan produced by the lgwks expression compiler. plan_id is SHA-256 of the canonical expression string, not the compiled object, so it is portable across machines with different capability wiring.

expression.description: Original expression string as supplied by the caller, before canonicalisation.

canonical_expression.description: Normalised expression: whitespace collapsed, args sorted by key, verb_id lowercased. SHA-256 of this string is plan_id.

manifest_version.description: Value of the 'manifest' field from build_manifest() at compile time. Allows replay to detect resolver drift.

steps.description: Ordered pipeline steps. Step N output feeds step N+1 input.

risk_class.description: Maximum risk_class across all steps. Invariant: equals max(step.risk_class).

shell.description: Must always be false. No step may execute through a shell interpreter.

destructive_requires_force.description: Destructive-class steps require an explicit force gate.

warnings.description: Non-fatal compile conditions: schema_unknown, primitive_unresolved, type_compat_assumed, etc.

PlanId.description: SHA-256 hex digest (64 lowercase hex chars) of the canonical_expression string.

VerbId.description: Dot-delimited agnostic verb identifier. No bash paths, no tool names. Examples: 'extract', 'geo.compile', 'memory.remember', 'jarvis.crawl'.

RiskClass.description: Ordered risk classes: read < mutate < unknown < destructive. Mirrors _RISK_ORDER in lgwks_multiply.

PrimitiveRef.description: Resolved primitive reference. Format: '<namespace>:<target>'. Null when verb_id is unresolved; forces needs_review=true. Examples: 'cli:extract', 'cli:geo compile', 'mcp:embed', 'skill:graphify', 'agent:coder'.

index.description: Zero-based position in the pipeline. Step 0 is the source; last step is the sink.

args.description: Key-value args for this step. Scalar values only; no nested objects.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema fragment describing the expected input type. {} means any.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema fragment describing the emitted output type. {} means any.

needs_review.description: True when the verb_id is unresolved or the primitive namespace is agent:/skill:. Blocks auto_allowed approval at plan level.
